_comment: All costs are EZ-Pass Class 1 (passenger car / 2-axle). GSP rates from 2026 GSP EZ-Pass rate sheet. Turnpike rates from 2026 TPK Class 1 Passenger Cars rate table — PLACEHOLDERS marked; look up Entry→Exit pair in the matrix PDF.

gsp_holmdel_ramp.name: GSP Holmdel Ramp (Exit 117)
gsp_holmdel_ramp.description: Charged in either direction when NOT using holmdel_crawfords (Exit 117). NE = $0.79, SX = $0.79.

gsp_raritan_sb.name: GSP Raritan Southbound Barrier
gsp_raritan_sb.description: Main line barrier — charges all southbound traffic.

gsp_bloomfield_se.name: GSP Bloomfield Southbound Entrance Ramp
gsp_bloomfield_se.description: Southbound entrance ramp at Bloomfield (Exit 148). Only applies to GSP via Bloomfield toHome route.

gsp_union_nb_barrier.name: GSP Union Northbound Barrier
gsp_union_nb_barrier.description: Main line barrier — charges all northbound traffic.

gsp_bloomfield_nx.name: GSP Bloomfield Northbound Exit Ramp
gsp_bloomfield_nx.description: Northbound exit ramp at Bloomfield (Exit 148). toWork GSP route only.

njtp_16w_to_11.name: NJ Turnpike Exit 16W ↔ Exit 11
njtp_16w_to_11.description: Natural/direct route toll. 2026 EZ-Pass Class 1 rate.

njtp_16e_to_11.name: NJ Turnpike Exit 16E ↔ Exit 11
njtp_16e_to_11.description: Secaucus forced routes. 2026 EZ-Pass Class 1 rate.

njtp_15w_to_11.name: NJ Turnpike Exit 15W ↔ Exit 11
njtp_15w_to_11.description: PLACEHOLDER — look up Entry 15W → Exit 11 in 2026 TPK Class 1 EZ-Pass matrix. Reserve for future 15W waypoint if needed.
